chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3509 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on M.A. 14914/2022 For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 14538/2022 For hearing of main case 13.12.2022 Raja Ghazanfar Ali, advocate for petitioner. ----- Petitioner is seeking restoration of PuccaPiri No.713 located at Irrigation Office Main Gate Court Road Nawabshah in favour of News Papers Hawkers Union Nawabshah. We have heard the petitioner. Nothing has been filed to show the connection of petitioner with the alleged PuccaPiri or his nexus with the News Papers Hawkers Union Nawabshah. In any case, if the PuccaPiri has been cancelled by the Municipal Authorities in favour of News Papers Hawkers Union Nawabshah, it may file an application before proper forum. No case for indulgence under Article 199 of the Constitution is made out. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
